scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:ts
scripts.check: pnpm run check:rust && pnpm run check:ts && pnpm run test:consumers
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --all --check && CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 cargo check --workspace && CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 cargo test --workspace && CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 cargo check -p socrates-math-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown
scripts.check:ts: pnpm --filter @socrates/math typecheck && pnpm --filter @socrates/math build && pnpm --filter @socrates/math-wasm typecheck && pnpm --filter @socrates/consumer-exercises-spec typecheck && pnpm --filter @socrates/playground typecheck
